attributes.Source Filter:
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME >= TO_TIMESTAMP('$$LastExtractDate','MM/DD/YYYY HH24:MI:SS:FF') - INTERVAL '$$OVERLAP_SECONDS' SECOND AND
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME <= (SELECT MAX(SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME) FROM $$SRCDB.CG1_XXCP_ADJUSTMENT_RATES)

attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT STG_CG1_XXCP_ADJUSTMENT_RATES.ADJUSTMENT_RATE_ID, STG_CG1_XXCP_ADJUSTMENT_RATES.RATE_SET_ID, STG_CG1_XXCP_ADJUSTMENT_RATES.OWNER, STG_CG1_XXCP_ADJUSTMENT_RATES.PARTNER, STG_CG1_XXCP_ADJUSTMENT_RATES.AR_QUALIFIER1, STG_CG1_XXCP_ADJUSTMENT_RATES.AR_QUALIFIER2, STG_CG1_XXCP_ADJUSTMENT_RATES.EFFECTIVE_FROM_DATE, STG_CG1_XXCP_ADJUSTMENT_RATES.EFFECTIVE_TO_DATE, STG_CG1_XXCP_ADJUSTMENT_RATES.RATE, STG_CG1_XXCP_ADJUSTMENT_RATES.RATE_DISPLAYED, STG_CG1_XXCP_ADJUSTMENT_RATES.ATTRIBUTE1, STG_CG1_XXCP_ADJUSTMENT_RATES.ATTRIBUTE2, STG_CG1_XXCP_ADJUSTMENT_RATES.ATTRIBUTE3, STG_CG1_XXCP_ADJUSTMENT_RATES.ATTRIBUTE4, STG_CG1_XXCP_ADJUSTMENT_RATES.ATTRIBUTE5, STG_CG1_XXCP_ADJUSTMENT_RATES.SECONDARY_RATE, STG_CG1_XXCP_ADJUSTMENT_RATES.SECONDARY_RATE_DISPLAYED, STG_CG1_XXCP_ADJUSTMENT_RATES.CREATED_BY, STG_CG1_XXCP_ADJUSTMENT_RATES.CREATION_DATE, STG_CG1_XXCP_ADJUSTMENT_RATES.LAST_UPDATED_BY, STG_CG1_XXCP_ADJUSTMENT_RATES.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, STG_CG1_XXCP_ADJUSTMENT_RATES.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN, STG_CG1_XXCP_ADJUSTMENT_RATES.MD_ID, STG_CG1_XXCP_ADJUSTMENT_RATES.SOURCE_ID, STG_CG1_XXCP_ADJUSTMENT_RATES.TRAIL_FILE_NAME, STG_CG1_XXCP_ADJUSTMENT_RATES.SOURCE_DML_TYPE, STG_CG1_XXCP_ADJUSTMENT_RATES.SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME, STG_CG1_XXCP_ADJUSTMENT_RATES.REFRESH_DATETIME, STG_CG1_XXCP_ADJUSTMENT_RATES.PROCESSED_FLAG 
FROM
 $$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CG1_XXCP_ADJUSTMENT_RATES STG_CG1_XXCP_ADJUSTMENT_RATES,
 (
 select AR_QUALIFIER2 ,RATE ,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CG1_XXCP_ADJUSTMENT_RATES
 minus
 select AR_QUALIFIER2 ,RATE ,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$NRTACCUMDB.CG1_XXCP_ADJUSTMENT_RATES
 ) ACM
 where 
COALESCE(ACM.AR_QUALIFIER2,'UNK') = COALESCE(STG_CG1_XXCP_ADJUSTMENT_RATES.AR_QUALIFIER2,'UNK')  and ACM.RATE = STG_CG1_XXCP_ADJUSTMENT_RATES.RATE and ACM.REFRESH_DATETIME=STG_CG1_XXCP_ADJUSTMENT_RATES.REFRESH_DATETIME
